tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes. Creatinine is also elevated, suggesting reduced kidney function. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, urea, calcium, and CO₂, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
